meta.title: Webspresso - Minimal SSR Framework
meta.description: A minimal, file-based SSR framework for Node.js with Nunjucks templating.

hero.title: Build Fast, Ship Faster
hero.description: Webspresso is a minimal, file-based SSR framework for Node.js. Blade-like templating with Nunjucks, automatic routing, and built-in i18n.

routing.title: File-Based Routing
routing.description: Create pages by adding .njk files. Dynamic params with [slug], catch-all with [...rest].

i18n.title: Built-in i18n
i18n.description: JSON-based translations with automatic locale detection. Global and route-level overrides.

hooks.title: Lifecycle Hooks
hooks.description: Hook into request lifecycle with beforeLoad, afterRender, and more. Global or per-route.

tools.title: Developer Tools
tools.description: A collection of useful tools to boost your productivity.

meta.title: Developer Tools - Webspresso
meta.description: A collection of useful developer tools to boost your productivity.

tool.placeholder: This tool interface is under development. Check back soon!

about.title: About Webspresso
about.intro: Webspresso is a minimal, production-leaning Node.js SSR framework designed with the "minimal files, maximum output" philosophy.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.item1: File-based routing for intuitive project structure
